ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2019 Fall) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of the season (e.g., regular, playoff, tournament) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the season (e.g., ongoing, completed, upcoming) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins in the season */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses in the season */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws in the season */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned in the season */,
  "average_runs" REAL /* Average runs scored per match */,
  "average_wickets" REAL /* Average wickets taken per match */,
  "best_bowling_performance" TEXT /* Best bowling performance in the season */,
  "best_batting_performance" TEXT /* Best batting performance in the season */,
  "home_away_performance" TEXT /* Performance difference between home and away matches */,
  "x2_01" INTEGER /* Metric X2 01 (specific performance indicator) */,
  "01" INTEGER /* Metric 01 (specific performance indicator) */,
  "cricket" INTEGER /* Metric Cricket (specific performance indicator) */,
  "x2_cricket" INTEGER /* Metric X2 Cricket (specific performance indicator) */,
  "team" INTEGER /* Number of teams involved (specific performance indicator) */,
  "tons" INTEGER /* Number of tons (specific performance indicator) */,
  "hi" INTEGER /* Highest individual score (specific performance indicator) */,
  "ho" INTEGER /* Highest opposition score (specific performance indicator) */,
  "r9" INTEGER /* Metric R9 (specific performance indicator) */,
  "t80" INTEGER /* Metric T80 (specific performance indicator) */,
  "6pk" INTEGER /* Metric 6PK (specific performance indicator) */,
  "do" INTEGER /* Metric DO (specific performance indicator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Short code or abbreviation for the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current coach of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in a match */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling performance in a match */,
  "player_of_the_match" INTEGER /* Number of player of the match awards */,
  "average_runs_per_match" REAL /* Average runs scored per match */,
  "average_wickets_per_match" REAL /* Average wickets taken per match */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Player's strike rate */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Player's economy rate */,
  "fielding_stats" TEXT /* Fielding statistics (e.g., catches, run-outs) */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., all-rounder, specialist batsman, specialist bowler) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
